name: Agentic AI Foundation / MCP
description: Neutral home for the Model Context Protocol under the Linux Foundation. Sets the protocol roadmap, registry direction, and conformance expectations for the ecosystem.

name: OWASP GenAI Security Project
description: MCP Top 10 plus Agentic Top 10 for 2026. The most operationally referenced free security framework for solo devs and enterprise teams alike.

name: Cloud Security Alliance
description: GenAI governance, shadow-AI visibility, and the CSA Agentic MCP Security Best Practices guide for enterprise practitioners.

name: CoSAI
description: Coalition for Secure AI under OASIS — industry working group producing secure-AI frameworks and cross-vendor alignment.

name: NIST CAISI AI Agent Standards Initiative
description: NIST's AI Agent Standards Initiative — the threat-model and standards backbone for federal and regulated-industry adoption.

name: MITRE ATLAS
description: Adversarial Threat Landscape for AI Systems. v5.4.0 added MCP/A2A-specific techniques — essential for red-team and SOC alignment.

name: CSA Agentic MCP Security Best Practices
description: Structured framework covering six MCP threat categories, a four-level maturity model, and mappings to OWASP ASI, AICM, and MITRE ATLAS.

name: EU AI Act
description: European Union AI Act compliance requirements increasingly referenced in MCP governance programs — especially audit trails and human oversight.
